     22 +RESET_DIRECTORIES = (
     23 +    "workflows",
     24 +    "input_sets",
     25 +    "jobs",
     26 +    ".trash",
     27 +    "failed_input_sets",
     28 +    "drafts",
     29 +    "tmp",
     30 +    "temp",
     31 +    "old_tasks",
     32 +)
     33 +REQUIRED_WORKSPACE_DIRECTORIES = ("workflows", "input_sets", "jobs", "backups")
     34 +
     35 +
     36 +@dataclass(frozen=True)
     37 +class DeleteResult:
     38 +    ok: bool
     39 +    entity_type: str
     40 +    entity_id: str
     41 +    deleted_db_records: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
     42 +    deleted_paths: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
     43 +    skipped_paths: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
     44 +    warnings: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
     45 +    errors: list[str] = field(default_factory=list)
     46 +    backup_path: Path | None = None
     47 +    dry_run: bool = False
     48 +
     49 +
     50 +@dataclass(frozen=True)
     51 +class FactoryResetResult(DeleteResult):
     52 +    pass
     53 +
     54 +
     55 +def ensure_path_inside_workspace(path: Path, workspace: Path) -> Path:
     56 +    """确认待操作路径位于 workspace 内。
     57 +
     58 +    删除本地文件前统一调用该函数，避免误删 VASP/VASPKIT/POTCAR 库、
     59 +    项目源码或用户主目录中的其他文件。
     60 +    """
     61 +
     62 +    root = Path(workspace).resolve()
     63 +    candidate = Path(path).resolve(strict=False)
     64 +    if candidate != root and root not in candidate.parents:
     65 +        raise ValueError(f"Path is outside workspace: {candidate}")
     66 +    return candidate
     67 +
     68 +
     69 +def preview_delete_workflow(db_path: Path, workflow_id: str, *, workspace: Path) -> DeleteResult:
     70 +    return delete_workflow(db_path, workflow_id, workspace=workspace, dry_run=True)
     71 +
     72 +
     73 +def delete_workflow(
     74 +    db_path: Path,
     75 +    workflow_id: str,
     76 +    *,
     77 +    workspace: Path,
     78 +    delete_files: bool = True,
     79 +    require_not_running: bool = True,
     80 +    dry_run: bool = False,
     81 +) -> DeleteResult:
     82 +    """删除一个 workflow 及只属于它的 job。
     83 +
     84 +    删除前会检查数据库状态、pid 是否存活以及 run_dir 下是否存在 VASP/MPI
     85 +    相关进程。发现仍在运行时只返回错误，不自动杀进程。
     86 +    """
     87 +
     88 +    result = _empty_result("workflow", workflow_id, dry_run=dry_run)
     89 +    root = Path(workspace)
     90 +    with _connect(db_path) as conn:
     91 +        workflow = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM workflows WHERE workflow_id = ?", (workflow_id,)).fetchone()
     92 +        if workflow is None:
     93 +            result.errors.append(f"Workflow not found: {workflow_id}")
     94 +            return _finalize(result)
     95 +        bindings = conn.execute(
     96 +            """
     97 +            SELECT wj.*, j.*
     98 +            FROM workflow_jobs wj
     99 +            JOIN jobs j ON j.job_id = wj.job_id
    100 +            WHERE wj.workflow_id = ?
    101 +            """,
    102 +            (workflow_id,),
    103 +        ).fetchall()
    104 +        if require_not_running:
    105 +            running = [_job_running_reason(row) for row in bindings]
    106 +            running = [item for item in running if item]
    107 +            if running:
    108 +                result.errors.extend(running)
    109 +                return _finalize(result)
    110 +
    111 +        orphan_job_ids: list[str] = []
    112 +        reused_job_run_dirs: list[Path] = []
    113 +        for row in bindings:
    114 +            refs = conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_jobs WHERE job_id = ?", (row["job_id"],)).fetchone()[0]
    115 +            if int(refs) <= 1:
    116 +                orphan_job_ids.append(row["job_id"])
    117 +                _append_path(result.deleted_paths, row["run_dir"], root)
    118 +            else:
    119 +                reused_job_run_dirs.append(Path(row["run_dir"]))
    120 +                result.warnings.append(f"Job is used by another workflow and will only be unbound: {row['job_id']}")
    121 +
    122 +        workflow_root = Path(workflow["root_dir"])
    123 +        if delete_files:
    124 +            if any(_path_is_inside(child, workflow_root) for child in reused_job_run_dirs):
    125 +                result.skipped_paths.append(str(workflow_root))
    126 +                result.warnings.append("Workflow root directory contains a reused job run_dir; root directory deletion skipped.")
    127 +            else:
    128 +                _append_path(result.deleted_paths, workflow_root, root)
    129 +
    130 +        result.deleted_db_records.append(f"workflow_jobs:{workflow_id}")
    131 +        result.deleted_db_records.append(f"workflows:{workflow_id}")
    132 +        for job_id in orphan_job_ids:
    133 +            result.deleted_db_records.append(f"job_metrics:{job_id}")
    134 +            result.deleted_db_records.append(f"jobs:{job_id}")
    135 +
    136 +        if dry_run or result.errors:
    137 +            return _finalize(result)
    138 +
    139 +        with conn:
    140 +            for job_id in orphan_job_ids:
    141 +                conn.execute("DELETE FROM job_metrics WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,))
    142 +                conn.execute("DELETE FROM jobs WHERE job_id = ?", (job_id,))
    143 +            conn.execute("DELETE FROM workflow_jobs WHERE workflow_id = ?", (workflow_id,))
    144 +            conn.execute("DELETE FROM workflows WHERE workflow_id = ?", (workflow_id,))
    145 +
    146 +    if delete_files:
    147 +        _delete_paths(result, root)
    148 +    return _finalize(result)
    149 +
    150 +
    151 +def preview_delete_input_set(db_path: Path, input_set_id: str, *, workspace: Path) -> DeleteResult:
    152 +    return delete_input_set(db_path, input_set_id, workspace=workspace, dry_run=True)
    153 +
    154 +
    155 +def delete_input_set(
    156 +    db_path: Path,
    157 +    input_set_id: str,
    158 +    *,
    159 +    workspace: Path,
    160 +    delete_files: bool = True,
    161 +    force: bool = False,
    162 +    dry_run: bool = False,
    163 +) -> DeleteResult:
    164 +    """删除未被任何 job 或旧 task 绑定的 Input Set。
    165 +
    166 +    第一版不开放 force delete；force 参数仅保留给后续危险模式扩展。
    167 +    """
    168 +
    169 +    result = _empty_result("input_set", input_set_id, dry_run=dry_run)
    170 +    root = Path(workspace)
    171 +    if force:
    172 +        result.errors.append("Force delete is not enabled in this version.")
    173 +        return _finalize(result)
    174 +    with _connect(db_path) as conn:
    175 +        record = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM input_sets WHERE input_set_id = ?", (input_set_id,)).fetchone()
    176 +        if record is None:
    177 +            result.errors.append(f"Input Set not found: {input_set_id}")
    178 +            return _finalize(result)
    179 +        job_refs = conn.execute("SELECT job_id FROM jobs WHERE input_set_id = ?", (input_set_id,)).fetchall()
    180 +        task_refs = conn.execute("SELECT task_id, role FROM task_input_sets WHERE input_set_id = ?", (input_set_id,)).fetchall()
    181 +        if job_refs or task_refs:
    182 +            for row in job_refs:
    183 +                result.errors.append(f"Input Set is used by job: {row['job_id']}")
    184 +            for row in task_refs:
    185 +                result.errors.append(f"Input Set is used by legacy task: {row['task_id']} ({row['role']})")
    186 +            return _finalize(result)
    187 +
    188 +        result.deleted_db_records.append(f"task_input_sets:{input_set_id}")
    189 +        result.deleted_db_records.append(f"input_sets:{input_set_id}")
    190 +        if delete_files:
    191 +            _append_path(result.deleted_paths, record["root_dir"], root)
    192 +
    193 +        if dry_run or result.errors:
    194 +            return _finalize(result)
    195 +
    196 +        with conn:
    197 +            conn.execute("DELETE FROM task_input_sets WHERE input_set_id = ?", (input_set_id,))
    198 +            conn.execute("DELETE FROM input_sets WHERE input_set_id = ?", (input_set_id,))
    199 +
    200 +    if delete_files:
    201 +        _delete_paths(result, root)
    202 +    return _finalize(result)
    203 +
    204 +
    205 +def preview_delete_legacy_task(db_path: Path, task_id: str, *, workspace: Path) -> DeleteResult:
    206 +    return delete_legacy_task(db_path, task_id, workspace=workspace, dry_run=True)
    207 +
    208 +
    209 +def delete_legacy_task(
    210 +    db_path: Path,
    211 +    task_id: str,
    212 +    *,
    213 +    workspace: Path,
    214 +    delete_files: bool = True,
    215 +    dry_run: bool = False,
    216 +) -> DeleteResult:
    217 +    """删除旧 tasks 表中的单个任务，不影响新的 jobs/workflows。"""
    218 +
    219 +    result = _empty_result("legacy_task", task_id, dry_run=dry_run)
    220 +    root = Path(workspace)
    221 +    with _connect(db_path) as conn:
    222 +        task = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM tasks WHERE task_id = ?", (task_id,)).fetchone()
    223 +        if task is None:
    224 +            result.errors.append(f"Legacy task not found: {task_id}")
    225 +            return _finalize(result)
    226 +        running_reason = _legacy_task_running_reason(task)
    227 +        if running_reason:
    228 +            result.errors.append(running_reason)
    229 +            return _finalize(result)
    230 +        result.deleted_db_records.extend([f"metrics:{task_id}", f"task_input_sets:{task_id}", f"tasks:{task_id}"])
    231 +        if delete_files:
    232 +            _append_path(result.deleted_paths, task["task_root"], root)
    233 +        if dry_run or result.errors:
    234 +            return _finalize(result)
    235 +        with conn:
    236 +            conn.execute("DELETE FROM metrics WHERE task_id = ?", (task_id,))
    237 +            conn.execute("DELETE FROM task_input_sets WHERE task_id = ?", (task_id,))
    238 +            conn.execute("DELETE FROM tasks WHERE task_id = ?", (task_id,))
    239 +
    240 +    if delete_files:
    241 +        _delete_paths(result, root)
    242 +    return _finalize(result)
    243 +
    244 +
    245 +def update_workflow_metadata(db_path: Path, workflow_id: str, *, name: str | None = None, notes: str | None = None) -> None:
    246 +    _update_metadata(db_path, "workflows", "workflow_id", workflow_id, name=name, notes=notes)
    247 +
    248 +
    249 +def update_input_set_metadata(db_path: Path, input_set_id: str, *, name: str | None = None, notes: str | None = None) -> None:
    250 +    _update_metadata(db_path, "input_sets", "input_set_id", input_set_id, name=name, notes=notes)
    251 +
    252 +
    253 +def update_job_metadata(db_path: Path, job_id: str, *, name: str | None = None, notes: str | None = None) -> None:
    254 +    _update_metadata(db_path, "jobs", "job_id", job_id, name=name, notes=notes)
    255 +
    256 +
    257 +def update_legacy_task_metadata(db_path: Path, task_id: str, *, name: str | None = None, notes: str | None = None) -> None:
    258 +    _update_metadata(db_path, "tasks", "task_id", task_id, name=name, notes=notes)
    259 +
    260 +
    261 +def preview_factory_reset(db_path: Path, *, workspace: Path) -> FactoryResetResult:
    262 +    return factory_reset(db_path, workspace=workspace, dry_run=True)
    263 +
    264 +
    265 +def factory_reset(db_path: Path, *, workspace: Path, dry_run: bool = False) -> FactoryResetResult:
    266 +    """清空业务数据并删除 workspace 内项目生成目录。
    267 +
    268 +    执行前会备份数据库，且 backups 目录不会在本次 reset 中清空。该函数不删除
    269 +    项目源码、.venv、config、tests，也不会触碰 workspace 之外的任何路径。
    270 +    """
    271 +
    272 +    result = FactoryResetResult(ok=True, entity_type="factory_reset", entity_id="workspace", dry_run=dry_run)
    273 +    root = Path(workspace)
    274 +    root.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    275 +    backup_path = _factory_reset_backup_path(root)
    276 +    result = _replace_result_backup(result, backup_path)
    277 +
    278 +    with _connect(db_path) as conn:
    279 +        running_errors = _running_business_processes(conn)
    280 +        if running_errors:
    281 +            result.errors.extend(running_errors)
    282 +            return _finalize(result)
    283 +        table_names = _table_names(conn)
    284 +        for table in BUSINESS_TABLES:
    285 +            if table in table_names:
    286 +                count = conn.execute(f"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table}").fetchone()[0]
    287 +                result.deleted_db_records.append(f"{table}:{count}")
    288 +        for table in sorted(name for name in table_names if name.startswith("adsorption")):
    289 +            count = conn.execute(f"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table}").fetchone()[0]
    290 +            result.deleted_db_records.append(f"{table}:{count}")
    291 +
    292 +        for dirname in RESET_DIRECTORIES:
    293 +            path = root / dirname
    294 +            if path.exists():
    295 +                _append_path(result.deleted_paths, path, root)
    296 +            else:
    297 +                result.skipped_paths.append(str(path))
    298 +
    299 +        for dirname in REQUIRED_WORKSPACE_DIRECTORIES:
    300 +            result.warnings.append(f"Directory will be recreated: {root / dirname}")
    301 +
    302 +        if dry_run or result.errors:
    303 +            return _finalize(result)
    304 +
    305 +        backup_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    306 +        if Path(db_path).exists():
    307 +            shutil.copy2(db_path, backup_path)
    308 +        else:
    309 +            backup_path.write_bytes(b"")
    310 +
    311 +        with conn:
    312 +            for table in BUSINESS_TABLES:
    313 +                if table in table_names:
    314 +                    conn.execute(f"DELETE FROM {table}")
    315 +            for table in sorted(name for name in table_names if name.startswith("adsorption")):
    316 +                conn.execute(f"DELETE FROM {table}")
    317 +
    318 +    _delete_paths(result, root)
    319 +    for dirname in REQUIRED_WORKSPACE_DIRECTORIES:
    320 +        (root / dirname).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    321 +    return _finalize(result)
    322 +
    323 +
    324 +def _connect(db_path: Path) -> sqlite3.Connection:
    325 +    conn = sqlite3.connect(Path(db_path))
    326 +    conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    327 +    return conn
    328 +
    329 +
    330 +def _empty_result(entity_type: str, entity_id: str, *, dry_run: bool = False) -> DeleteResult:
    331 +    return DeleteResult(ok=True, entity_type=entity_type, entity_id=entity_id, dry_run=dry_run)
    332 +
    333 +
    334 +def _finalize(result):
    335 +    result.ok = not result.errors
    336 +    return result
    337 +
    338 +
    339 +def _append_path(paths: list[str], path: str | Path | None, workspace: Path) -> None:
    340 +    if path is None:
    341 +        return
    342 +    try:
    343 +        safe = ensure_path_inside_workspace(Path(path), workspace)
    344 +    except ValueError as exc:
    345 +        raise ValueError(str(exc)) from exc
    346 +    if safe == Path(workspace).resolve():
    347 +        raise ValueError(f"Refuse to delete workspace root directly: {safe}")
    348 +    text = str(safe)
    349 +    if text not in paths:
    350 +        paths.append(text)
    351 +
    352 +
    353 +def _delete_paths(result: DeleteResult, workspace: Path) -> None:
    354 +    for raw in list(result.deleted_paths):
    355 +        try:
    356 +            path = ensure_path_inside_workspace(Path(raw), workspace)
    357 +            if path == Path(workspace).resolve():
    358 +                result.errors.append(f"Refuse to delete workspace root directly: {path}")
    359 +                continue
    360 +            if not path.exists():
    361 +                result.skipped_paths.append(str(path))
    362 +                continue
    363 +            if path.is_file() or path.is_symlink():
    364 +                path.unlink()
    365 +            elif path.is_dir():
    366 +                shutil.rmtree(path)
    367 +        except Exception as exc:
    368 +            result.errors.append(str(exc))
    369 +
    370 +
    371 +def _path_is_inside(path: Path, parent: Path) -> bool:
    372 +    candidate = Path(path).resolve(strict=False)
    373 +    root = Path(parent).resolve(strict=False)
    374 +    return candidate == root or root in candidate.parents
    375 +
    376 +
    377 +def _job_running_reason(row: sqlite3.Row) -> str | None:
    378 +    job_id = row["job_id"]
    379 +    status = row["status"]
    380 +    pid = row["pid"]
    381 +    run_dir = Path(row["run_dir"])
    382 +    if status == "running":
    383 +        return f"Job is marked running: {job_id}"
    384 +    if pid is not None and is_process_alive(int(pid)):
    385 +        return f"Job pid is still alive: {job_id} pid={pid}"
    386 +    if find_processes_by_run_dir(run_dir):
    387 +        return f"VASP/MPI process found under job run_dir: {job_id}"
    388 +    return None
    389 +
    390 +
    391 +def _legacy_task_running_reason(row: sqlite3.Row) -> str | None:
    392 +    task_id = row["task_id"]
    393 +    status = row["status"]
    394 +    pid = row["pid"]
    395 +    task_root = Path(row["task_root"])
    396 +    if status == "running":
    397 +        return f"Legacy task is marked running: {task_id}"
    398 +    if pid is not None and is_process_alive(int(pid)):
    399 +        return f"Legacy task pid is still alive: {task_id} pid={pid}"
    400 +    for path in (task_root, task_root / "run"):
    401 +        if path.exists() and find_processes_by_run_dir(path):
    402 +            return f"VASP/MPI process found under legacy task path: {task_id}"
    403 +    return None
    404 +
    405 +
    406 +def _running_business_processes(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> list[str]:
    407 +    errors: list[str] = []
    408 +    for row in conn.execute("SELECT * FROM jobs").fetchall():
    409 +        reason = _job_running_reason(row)
    410 +        if reason:
    411 +            errors.append(reason)
    412 +    for row in conn.execute("SELECT * FROM tasks").fetchall():
    413 +        reason = _legacy_task_running_reason(row)
    414 +        if reason:
    415 +            errors.append(reason)
    416 +    return errors
    417 +
    418 +
    419 +def _update_metadata(
    420 +    db_path: Path,
    421 +    table: str,
    422 +    id_column: str,
    423 +    entity_id: str,
    424 +    *,
    425 +    name: str | None,
    426 +    notes: str | None,
    427 +) -> None:
    428 +    if table not in {"workflows", "input_sets", "jobs", "tasks"}:
    429 +        raise ValueError(f"Unsupported metadata table: {table}")
    430 +    fields = ["updated_at = ?"]
    431 +    values: list[object] = [_now()]
    432 +    if name is not None:
    433 +        fields.append("name = ?")
    434 +        values.append(name)
    435 +    if notes is not None:
    436 +        fields.append("notes = ?")
    437 +        values.append(notes)
    438 +    values.append(entity_id)
    439 +    with _connect(db_path) as conn:
    440 +        with conn:
    441 +            conn.execute(
    442 +                f"UPDATE {table} SET {', '.join(fields)} WHERE {id_column} = ?",
    443 +                tuple(values),
    444 +            )
    445 +
    446 +
    447 +def _table_names(conn: sqlite3.Connection) -> set[str]:
    448 +    rows = conn.execute("SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = 'table'").fetchall()
    449 +    return {row["name"] for row in rows}
    450 +
    451 +
    452 +def _factory_reset_backup_path(workspace: Path) -> Path:
    453 +    timestamp = datetime.utcnow().strftime("%Y%m%d_%H%M%S_%f")
    454 +    return Path(workspace) / "backups" / f"vasp_mvp_before_factory_reset_{timestamp}.db"
    455 +
    456 +
    457 +def _replace_result_backup(result: FactoryResetResult, backup_path: Path) -> FactoryResetResult:
    458 +    return FactoryResetResult(
    459 +        ok=result.ok,
    460 +        entity_type=result.entity_type,
    461 +        entity_id=result.entity_id,
    462 +        deleted_db_records=result.deleted_db_records,
    463 +        deleted_paths=result.deleted_paths,
    464 +        skipped_paths=result.skipped_paths,
    465 +        warnings=result.warnings,
    466 +        errors=result.errors,
    467 +        backup_path=backup_path,
    468 +        dry_run=result.dry_run,
    469 +    )
    470 +
    471 +
    472 +def _now() -> str:
    473 +    return datetime.utcnow().isoformat(timespec="seconds")

    1400 +def show_metadata_editor(entity_type: str, entity_id: str, name: str | None, notes: str | None, save_fn) -> None:
    1401 +    with st.expander(tr("data_management.edit_metadata"), expanded=False):
    1402 +        st.caption(tr("data_management.id_locked", entity_id=entity_id))
    1403 +        name_value = st.text_input(tr("data_management.name"), value=name or "", key=f"dm_name_{entity_type}_{entity_id}")
    1404 +        notes_value = st.text_area(tr("data_management.notes"), value=notes or "", key=f"dm_notes_{entity_type}_{entity_id}")
    1405 +        if st.button(tr("data_management.save"), key=f"dm_save_{entity_type}_{entity_id}"):
    1406 +            try:
    1407 +                save_fn(name_value, notes_value)
    1408 +                st.success(tr("data_management.save_success"))
    1409 +                st.rerun()
    1410 +            except Exception as exc:
    1411 +                st.error(tr("data_management.save_failed", error=str(exc)))
    1412 +
    1413 +
    1414 +def show_delete_preview_and_action(entity_type: str, entity_id: str, preview_fn, delete_fn) -> None:
    1415 +    with st.expander(tr("data_management.delete_confirm"), expanded=False):
    1416 +        preview = preview_fn()
    1417 +        show_delete_result(preview, title_key="data_management.delete_preview")
    1418 +        confirm = st.checkbox(
    1419 +            tr("data_management.delete_checkbox", entity_id=entity_id),
    1420 +            key=f"dm_confirm_delete_{entity_type}_{entity_id}",
    1421 +        )
    1422 +        typed = st.text_input(
    1423 +            tr("data_management.delete_type_id", entity_id=entity_id),
    1424 +            key=f"dm_delete_text_{entity_type}_{entity_id}",
    1425 +        )
    1426 +        if st.button(
    1427 +            tr("data_management.delete_selected"),
    1428 +            disabled=not confirm or typed != entity_id,
    1429 +            key=f"dm_delete_{entity_type}_{entity_id}",
    1430 +        ):
    1431 +            try:
    1432 +                result = delete_fn()
    1433 +                show_delete_result(result, title_key="data_management.delete_result")
    1434 +                if result.ok:
    1435 +                    st.success(tr("data_management.delete_success"))
    1436 +                    st.rerun()
    1437 +                else:
    1438 +                    st.error(tr("data_management.delete_failed"))
    1439 +            except Exception as exc:
    1440 +                st.error(tr("data_management.delete_failed_with_error", error=str(exc)))
    1441 +
    1442 +
    1443 +def show_factory_reset_section(config, db_file: Path) -> None:
    1444 +    st.warning(tr("data_management.factory_reset_warning"))
    1445 +    preview = preview_factory_reset(db_file, workspace=config.workspace)
    1446 +    show_delete_result(preview, title_key="data_management.factory_reset_preview")
    1447 +    if preview.backup_path:
    1448 +        st.info(tr("data_management.backup_path", path=preview.backup_path))
    1449 +    confirm_text = st.text_input(tr("data_management.factory_reset_confirm_text"), key="dm_factory_reset_text")
    1450 +    confirmed = st.checkbox(tr("data_management.factory_reset_checkbox"), key="dm_factory_reset_checkbox")
    1451 +    if st.button(
    1452 +        tr("data_management.factory_reset_button"),
    1453 +        disabled=confirm_text != "CLEAR ALL" or not confirmed,
    1454 +        key="dm_factory_reset_button",
    1455 +    ):
    1456 +        try:
    1457 +            result = factory_reset(db_file, workspace=config.workspace)
    1458 +            show_delete_result(result, title_key="data_management.factory_reset_result")
    1459 +            if result.backup_path:
    1460 +                st.info(tr("data_management.backup_path", path=result.backup_path))
    1461 +            if result.ok:
    1462 +                st.success(tr("data_management.factory_reset_success"))
    1463 +                st.rerun()
    1464 +            else:
    1465 +                st.error(tr("data_management.factory_reset_failed"))
    1466 +        except Exception as exc:
    1467 +            st.error(tr("data_management.factory_reset_failed_with_error", error=str(exc)))
    1468 +
    1469 +
    1470 +def show_delete_result(result, title_key: str) -> None:
    1471 +    st.markdown(f"**{tr(title_key)}**")
    1472 +    if result.deleted_db_records:
    1473 +        st.write(tr("data_management.deleted_db_records"))
    1474 +        st.code("\n".join(result.deleted_db_records), language="text")
    1475 +    if result.deleted_paths:
    1476 +        st.write(tr("data_management.deleted_paths"))
    1477 +        st.code("\n".join(result.deleted_paths), language="text")
    1478 +    if result.skipped_paths:
    1479 +        st.write(tr("data_management.skipped_paths"))
    1480 +        st.code("\n".join(result.skipped_paths), language="text")
    1481 +    if result.warnings:
    1482 +        st.warning("\n".join(result.warnings))
    1483 +    if result.errors:
    1484 +        st.error("\n".join(result.errors))
    1485 +
    1486 +
    1487 +def list_jobs_for_all_workflows(db_file: Path):
    1488 +    pairs = []
    1489 +    for workflow in list_workflows(db_file):
    1490 +        pairs.extend(list_jobs_for_workflow(db_file, workflow.workflow_id))
    1491 +    seen = set()
    1492 +    unique = []
    1493 +    for binding, job in pairs:
    1494 +        if job.job_id in seen:
    1495 +            continue
    1496 +        seen.add(job.job_id)
    1497 +        unique.append((binding, job))
    1498 +    return unique
    1499 +

     32 +class DataManagementTest(unittest.TestCase):
     33 +    def test_delete_workflow_removes_owned_jobs_metrics_and_files(self) -> None:
     34 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
     35 +            workspace, database = _init_workspace(tmp)
     36 +            _create_workflow_with_three_jobs(database, workspace)
     37 +
     38 +            result = delete_workflow(database, "wf-1", workspace=workspace)
     39 +
     40 +            self.assertTrue(result.ok, result.errors)
     41 +            self.assertIsNone(get_workflow(database, "wf-1"))
     42 +            self.assertIsNone(get_job(database, "job-clean"))
     43 +            self.assertFalse((workspace / "workflows" / "wf-1").exists())
     44 +            with sqlite3.connect(database) as conn:
     45 +                self.assertEqual(conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM workflow_jobs").fetchone()[0], 0)
     46 +                self.assertEqual(conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM job_metrics").fetchone()[0], 0)
     47 +
     48 +    def test_delete_workflow_rejects_running_job_and_keeps_data(self) -> None:
     49 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
     50 +            workspace, database = _init_workspace(tmp)
     51 +            _create_workflow_with_three_jobs(database, workspace, clean_status="running")
     52 +
     53 +            result = delete_workflow(database, "wf-1", workspace=workspace)
     54 +
     55 +            self.assertFalse(result.ok)
     56 +            self.assertIn("running", "\n".join(result.errors))
     57 +            self.assertIsNotNone(get_workflow(database, "wf-1"))
     58 +            self.assertTrue((workspace / "workflows" / "wf-1").exists())
     59 +
     60 +    def test_delete_input_set_removes_unused_record_and_directory(self) -> None:
     61 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
     62 +            workspace, database = _init_workspace(tmp)
     63 +            conn = sqlite3.connect(database)
     64 +            conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
     65 +            _create_input_set(conn, workspace, "is-unused")
     66 +            conn.close()
     67 +
     68 +            result = delete_input_set(database, "is-unused", workspace=workspace)
     69 +
     70 +            self.assertTrue(result.ok, result.errors)
     71 +            self.assertFalse((workspace / "input_sets" / "is-unused").exists())
     72 +            with sqlite3.connect(database) as conn:
     73 +                count = conn.execute("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM input_sets WHERE input_set_id = 'is-unused'").fetchone()[0]
     74 +            self.assertEqual(count, 0)
     75 +
     76 +    def test_delete_input_set_rejects_job_and_legacy_task_references(self) -> None:

     91 +            conn.close()

     95 +                calculation_type="static",
     96 +                run_dir=workspace / "jobs" / "job-uses-input" / "run",

    100 +            result = delete_input_set(database, "is-used", workspace=workspace)

    134 +    def test_factory_reset_clears_business_tables_recreates_dirs_and_preserves_backup(self) -> None:
    135 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    136 +            workspace, database = _init_workspace(tmp)
    137 +            _create_workflow_with_three_jobs(database, workspace)

    145 +                task_type="static",
    146 +                task_root=workspace / "legacy" / "legacy-reset",
    147 +                status="committed",
    148 +            )
    149 +            conn.close()
    150 +
    151 +            preview = preview_factory_reset(database, workspace=workspace)
    152 +            result = factory_reset(database, workspace=workspace)
    153 +
    154 +            self.assertTrue(preview.backup_path)
    155 +            self.assertTrue(result.ok, result.errors)
    156 +            self.assertTrue(result.backup_path.exists())
    157 +            self.assertTrue((workspace / "backups").exists())
    158 +            self.assertTrue((workspace / "workflows").is_dir())
    159 +            self.assertTrue((workspace / "input_sets").is_dir())
    160 +            self.assertTrue((workspace / "jobs").is_dir())
    161 +            self.assertEqual(list((workspace / "workflows").iterdir()), [])
    162 +            self.assertEqual(list((workspace / "input_sets").iterdir()), [])
    163 +            with sqlite3.connect(database) as conn:
    164 +                for table in ("workflow_jobs", "job_metrics", "jobs", "workflows", "input_sets", "tasks", "metrics"):
    165 +                    self.assertEqual(conn.execute(f"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {table}").fetchone()[0], 0, table)
    166 +
    167 +    def test_factory_reset_rejects_live_or_running_job_without_deleting_files(self) -> None:
    168 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    169 +            workspace, database = _init_workspace(tmp)
    170 +            _create_workflow_with_three_jobs(database, workspace, clean_status="running")
    171 +
    172 +            result = factory_reset(database, workspace=workspace)
    173 +
    174 +            self.assertFalse(result.ok)
    175 +            self.assertFalse(result.backup_path.exists())
    176 +            self.assertTrue((workspace / "workflows" / "wf-1").exists())
    177 +
    178 +    def test_path_safety_rejects_workspace_outside_path(self) -> None:
    179 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    180 +            workspace = Path(tmp) / "workspace"
    181 +            outside = Path(tmp) / "outside"
    182 +            workspace.mkdir()
    183 +            outside.mkdir()
    184 +
    185 +            with self.assertRaisesRegex(ValueError, "outside workspace"):
    186 +                ensure_path_inside_workspace(outside, workspace)
    187 +
    188 +    def test_edit_metadata_updates_name_notes_and_updated_at(self) -> None:
    189 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    190 +            workspace, database = _init_workspace(tmp)
    191 +            conn = sqlite3.connect(database)
    192 +            conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    193 +            _create_input_set(conn, workspace, "is-edit")
    194 +            conn.close()
    195 +            create_workflow(
    196 +                database,
    197 +                workflow_id="wf-edit",
    198 +                workflow_type="adsorption",
    199 +                name="old workflow",
    200 +                root_dir=workspace / "workflows" / "wf-edit",
    201 +                notes="old",
    202 +            )
    203 +            with sqlite3.connect(database) as conn:
    204 +                conn.execute("UPDATE workflows SET updated_at = '2000-01-01T00:00:00' WHERE workflow_id = 'wf-edit'")
    205 +                conn.execute("UPDATE input_sets SET updated_at = '2000-01-01T00:00:00' WHERE input_set_id = 'is-edit'")
    206 +                conn.commit()
    207 +
    208 +            update_workflow_metadata(database, "wf-edit", name="new workflow", notes="new notes")
    209 +            update_input_set_metadata(database, "is-edit", name="new input", notes="input notes")
    210 +
    211 +            with sqlite3.connect(database) as conn:
    212 +                conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    213 +                workflow = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM workflows WHERE workflow_id = 'wf-edit'").fetchone()
    214 +                input_set = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM input_sets WHERE input_set_id = 'is-edit'").fetchone()
    215 +            self.assertEqual(workflow["name"], "new workflow")
    216 +            self.assertEqual(workflow["notes"], "new notes")
    217 +            self.assertNotEqual(workflow["updated_at"], "2000-01-01T00:00:00")
    218 +            self.assertEqual(input_set["name"], "new input")
    219 +            self.assertEqual(input_set["notes"], "input notes")
    220 +            self.assertNotEqual(input_set["updated_at"], "2000-01-01T00:00:00")
    221 +
    222 +    def test_delete_workflow_checks_real_process_state_not_only_database_status(self) -> None:
    223 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    224 +            workspace, database = _init_workspace(tmp)
    225 +            _create_workflow_with_three_jobs(database, workspace)
    226 +
    227 +            with patch("vasp_mvp.data_management.find_processes_by_run_dir", return_value=[object()]):
    228 +                result = delete_workflow(database, "wf-1", workspace=workspace)
    229 +
    230 +            self.assertFalse(result.ok)
    231 +            self.assertIn("process", "\n".join(result.errors))
    232 +            self.assertTrue((workspace / "workflows" / "wf-1").exists())
    233 +
    234 +
    235 +def _init_workspace(tmp: str) -> tuple[Path, Path]:
    236 +    workspace = Path(tmp) / "workspace"
    237 +    init_db(workspace).close()
    238 +    for dirname in ("workflows", "input_sets", "jobs", "backups"):
    239 +        (workspace / dirname).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    240 +    return workspace, db_path(workspace)
    241 +
    242 +
    243 +def _create_workflow_with_three_jobs(
    244 +    database: Path,
    245 +    workspace: Path,
    246 +    *,
    247 +    clean_status: str = "committed",
    248 +) -> None:
    249 +    workflow_root = workspace / "workflows" / "wf-1"
    250 +    create_workflow(
    251 +        database,
    252 +        workflow_id="wf-1",
    253 +        workflow_type="adsorption",
    254 +        name="workflow",
    255 +        root_dir=workflow_root,
    256 +        status="committed",
    257 +    )
    258 +    roles = (
    259 +        ("clean_slab", "job-clean", "slab_static", clean_status, 1),
    260 +        ("molecule_ref", "job-molecule", "molecule_static", "committed", 2),
    261 +        ("adsorbed_system", "job-adsorbed", "adsorbed_static", "committed", 3),
    262 +    )
    263 +    for role, job_id, calculation_type, status, step_order in roles:
    264 +        run_dir = workflow_root / role / "run"
    265 +        run_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    266 +        (run_dir / "marker.txt").write_text(job_id, encoding="utf-8")
    267 +        create_job(database, job_id=job_id, calculation_type=calculation_type, status=status, run_dir=run_dir)
    268 +        save_job_metrics(database, job_id, Metrics(toten_ev=-1.0))
    269 +        bind_job_to_workflow(database, workflow_id="wf-1", job_id=job_id, role=role, step_order=step_order)
    270 +
    271 +
    272 +def _create_input_set(conn, workspace: Path, input_set_id: str) -> None:
    273 +    root_dir = workspace / "input_sets" / input_set_id
    274 +    root_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    275 +    for filename in ("INCAR", "POSCAR", "KPOINTS", "POTCAR"):
    276 +        (root_dir / filename).write_text(f"{filename}\n", encoding="utf-8")
    277 +    create_input_set(
    278 +        conn,
    279 +        input_set_id=input_set_id,
    280 +        name=input_set_id,
    281 +        source="manual",
    282 +        status="validated",
    283 +        usable_for_vasp=True,
    284 +        root_dir=root_dir,
    285 +        incar_path=root_dir / "INCAR",
    286 +        poscar_path=root_dir / "POSCAR",
    287 +        kpoints_path=root_dir / "KPOINTS",
    288 +        potcar_path=root_dir / "POTCAR",
    289 +    )
    290 +
    291 +
    292 +if __name__ == "__main__":
    293 +    unittest.main()

## 65

› 请遵守 AGENTS.md。

  我已经测试了数据管理功能，基本正常。现在进入下一阶段：创建命名规范、Input Set 专业校验、POTCAR 摘要显示和吸附能 Workflow 方法说明自动生成。

  本阶段优化目标：

  1. VASPKIT 输入文件生成模块创建 Input Set 时，不允许用户编辑 input_set_id。
     - input_set_id 必须后台自动生成并写入数据库。
     - 用户只输入 name 和 notes。
     - name 不能为空。
     - name 在 input_sets 表中不能重复。
     - notes 与 Data Management 页面中可编辑的 notes 是同一个字段。

  2. 创建 Adsorption Workflow 时，不允许用户编辑 workflow_id。
     - workflow_id 必须后台自动生成。
     - 用户输入 workflow name 和 notes。
     - workflow name 不能为空。
     - workflow name 在 workflows 表中不能重复。
     - notes 与 Data Management 页面中可编辑的 notes 是同一个字段。

  3. 清理 Input Sets 页面。
     - 删除或隐藏“使用该 Input Set 创建任务”这类旧入口。
     - 不再从 Input Set 直接创建旧 task。
     - Input Set 只负责查看、编辑、校验、作为 workflow 输入文件组。

  4. 修复 POTCAR 元素顺序读取。
     当前验证摘要中总出现：
     “无法从 POTCAR TITEL 行读取元素顺序。”

     需要增强 POTCAR parser：
     - 优先从 VRHFIN =Element: 读取元素顺序；
     - 如果 VRHFIN 不存在，再从 TITEL 行解析；
     - TITEL 示例：
       TITEL = PAW_PBE Ce 08Apr2002
       TITEL = PAW_PBE Ce_sv ...
       TITEL = PAW_PBE Ce_pv ...
       TITEL = PAW_PBE O ...
     - 元素解析时应识别 Ce_sv / Ce_pv / Ce_3 等后缀对应元素 Ce；
     - 同时保留 potential label，如 Ce_sv、Ce_pv；
     - 如果仍无法解析，给 warning，不要 error，除非无法获得 POTCAR 中任何元素信息。

  5. POTCAR UI 摘要增强。
     不显示 POTCAR 全文，不提供 POTCAR 文本编辑。
     但可以显示 POTCAR 关键信息：

     - file size
     - sha256
     - number of potentials
     - element order
     - potential labels
     - TITEL lines
     - VRHFIN elements
     - ENMAX / ENMIN
     - ZVAL
     - PAW family，例如 PAW_PBE

     请以表格显示每个 potential 的摘要信息。

  6. 新增专业 Input Set 校验功能。

  建议新增：

  src/vasp_mvp/input_set_validation.py

  ValidationResult:
  - ok: bool
  - errors: list[ValidationIssue]
  - warnings: list[ValidationIssue]
  - infos: list[ValidationIssue]

  ValidationIssue:
  - code
  - severity: error / warning / info
  - message_key
  - details

  校验项目至少包括：

  A. 文件完整性：
  - INCAR 存在且非空
  - POSCAR 存在且非空
  - KPOINTS 存在且非空
  - POTCAR 存在且非空

  B. POSCAR / POTCAR 元素顺序一致：
  - 从 POSCAR 解析元素顺序；
  - 从 POTCAR 解析元素顺序；
  - 不一致则 error。

  C. ENCUT 检查：
  - 从 POTCAR 读取所有 ENMAX；
  - 取 max ENMAX；
  - 从 INCAR 读取 ENCUT；
  - 如果 ENCUT 缺失：warning；
  - 如果 ENCUT < max ENMAX：error 或 warning；
  - 如果 ENCUT < 1.3 * max ENMAX：warning；
  - 如果 ENCUT >= 1.3 * max ENMAX：info/pass。

  D. 泛函匹配检查：
  - 从 POTCAR TITEL 判断 PAW_PBE / PAW_LDA；
  - 从 INCAR 或 workflow method 判断 PBE / LDA / PBE-D3 / HSE06 / PBE+U；
  - 若明显不一致，warning。

  E. DFT-D3 检查：
  - 如果 functional/method_notes 或 INCAR key 表明 PBE-D3；
  - 检查 INCAR 是否存在 IVDW；
  - 缺失则 warning。

  F. DFT+U 检查：
  - 如果 functional 是 PBE+U 或 method_family 是 DFT+U；
  - 检查 LDAU / LDAUL / LDAUU / LDAUJ；
  - 缺失则 warning。
  - 如果含过渡金属或 Ce 等 f/d 元素，给 info 提醒是否需要 DFT+U 取决于文献和研究目标，不要强制报错。

  G. KPOINTS 检查：
  - molecule_ref 通常建议 Gamma-only；
  - slab / adsorbed_system 通常 kz=1；
  - 如果 role 信息未知，只给通用 warning，不报错。

  H. 静态计算检查：
  - 用于吸附能最终能量的 Input Set 建议 NSW=0 或 IBRION=-1；
  - 如果 NSW>0，warning：可能是结构优化，不建议直接用于最终吸附能。

  7. Input Set 编辑后的校验。
     如果用户编辑 INCAR / POSCAR / KPOINTS：
     - status=edited
     - usable_for_vasp=false
     - 必须点击 Validate Input Set 后才能恢复 usable_for_vasp=true。
     - Validate Input Set 使用新的专业校验函数。
     - 只有没有 errors 时，才可以 usable_for_vasp=true。
     - warnings 可以允许通过，但 UI 必须显示。

  8. 创建 Adsorption Workflow 时方法说明自动生成。

  新增：

  src/vasp_mvp/method_advisor.py

  根据：
  - method_family
  - functional
  - adsorbate_name
  - system_type = adsorption
  - input set elements，如能获得
  - 是否含过渡金属 / 稀土 / Ce 等

  自动生成 method_notes 或 recommended_method_description。

  UI 中：
  - 用户选择 method_family / functional 后，自动生成专业说明；
  - 用户可以编辑 notes；
  - 自动说明与 workflow.notes 或 method_notes 字段保持一致，具体由现有数据库字段决定；
  - Data Management 中编辑的 notes 仍然是同一个字段，不要另存一份无关联 notes。

  方法说明示例要求：

  PBE：
  说明其适合一般结构优化和基准 DFT 总能量计算，但对范德华吸附可能低估弱相互作用。

  PBE-D3：
  说明其适合分子吸附、表面吸附、弱相互作用和含范德华贡献的体系。

  HSE06：
  说明其适合更准确电子结构、带隙和局域态描述，但计算成本高，适合作关键构型验证。

  PBE+U / DFT+U：
  说明其适合含过渡金属 d 电子或稀土 f 电子体系，U 值应来自文献或测试，不建议随意设置。

  9. i18n。
    所有 UI 文本和 validation issue 都要中英双语。
    补齐 zh.json 和 en.json。

  至少新增：
  - input_set.name_required
  - input_set.name_duplicate
  - input_set.notes
  - input_set.auto_id
  - input_set.validation.title
  - input_set.validation.errors
  - input_set.validation.warnings
  - input_set.validation.infos
  - input_set.validation.poscar_potcar_order_mismatch
  - input_set.validation.potcar_order_unreadable
  - input_set.validation.encut_missing
  - input_set.validation.encut_below_enmax
  - input_set.validation.encut_below_recommended
  - input_set.validation.functional_mismatch
  - input_set.validation.d3_missing_ivdw
  - input_set.validation.dftu_missing_tags
  - input_set.validation.static_recommended
  - input_set.potcar_summary.title
  - input_set.potcar_summary.element
  - input_set.potcar_summary.potential
  - input_set.potcar_summary.enmax
  - input_set.potcar_summary.zval
  - method_advisor.title
  - method_advisor.generated_description

  10. 数据库和唯一性。

     - input_sets.name 应用层检查唯一；
     - workflows.name 应用层检查唯一；
     - 不要让用户编辑 id；
     - 如果要加 UNIQUE index，需要先处理旧重复数据。第一版可先做应用层唯一性检查，不强制数据库 index。

  11. 测试。

  新增或补充：
  - tests/test_input_set_validation.py
  - tests/test_potcar_summary.py
  - tests/test_method_advisor.py
  - 现有 VASPKIT/Input Set 创建测试

  测试覆盖：

  A. 创建 Input Set 时用户不能指定 ID，ID 自动生成。
  B. Input Set name 重复时报错。
  C. Workflow name 重复时报错。
  D. notes 创建时写入，Data Management 编辑的是同一字段。
  E. POTCAR VRHFIN 解析元素顺序成功。
  F. POTCAR TITEL 解析 Ce_sv / Ce_pv / O 成功。
  G. POSCAR / POTCAR 元素顺序不一致时报 error。
  H. ENCUT < ENMAX_max 给 warning/error。
  I. ENCUT >= 1.3 ENMAX_max 给 pass/info。
  J. POTCAR summary 不包含 POTCAR 全文。
  K. method_advisor 对 PBE / PBE-D3 / HSE06 / PBE+U 生成不同说明。
  L. 编辑 INCAR 后 usable_for_vasp=false，validate 后无 errors 才恢复 true。

  12. 不要做这些事：
  - 不启动 VASP；
  - 不启动 VASPKIT，除非用户正常点击完整生成四件套；
  - 不改变 VASPKIT 主生成逻辑；
  - 不做单文件 VASPKIT 重新生成；
  - 不显示 POTCAR 全文；
  - 不删除数据；
  - 不改吸附能公式；
  - 不做 UI 大重构；
  - 不使用 shell=True。

  13. 修改后运行：
    python3 -m compileall src app.py
    .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests
    grep -R -n --exclude-dir=__pycache__ "shell *= *True\\|shell=True" app.py src tests

## 66

› 计划整体可以执行，但请在实现时补充以下要求。

  1. name 唯一性检查要做归一化。

  创建和编辑 Input Set / Workflow name 时，都要检查重复。

  规则：
  - name 必填；
  - name.strip() 不能为空；
  - 使用 name.strip().lower() 做唯一性判断；
  - 同类型内唯一：
    - input_sets.name 不能重复；
    - workflows.name 不能重复；
  - 编辑 name 时也要检查重复，不能改成已有名称；
  - 不要求 input_set 和 workflow 之间全局唯一。

  2. method_notes 和 notes 必须分开。

  - workflows.notes 是普通备注，与 Data Management 编辑的备注是同一个字段；
  - workflows.method_notes 是计算方法说明，用于 PBE/PBE-D3/HSE06/PBE+U 等专业解释；
  - 不要让 method_advisor 自动生成的说明覆盖 workflows.notes；
  - Data Management 中编辑 notes 不应覆盖 method_notes；
  - Adsorption Workflow 创建页面可以显示和编辑 method_notes，但它应写入 workflows.method_notes。

  3. Input Set validation 的 error / warning / info 分级要明确。

  ERROR，阻止 usable_for_vasp=true：
  - INCAR 缺失或为空；
  - POSCAR 缺失或为空；
  - KPOINTS 缺失或为空；
  - POTCAR 缺失或为空；
  - POSCAR/POTCAR 元素顺序明确不一致。

  WARNING，可以通过但必须显示：
  - ENCUT 缺失；
  - ENCUT < max ENMAX；
  - ENCUT < 1.3 × max ENMAX；
  - PBE-D3 但 INCAR 缺少 IVDW；
  - DFT+U 但 INCAR 缺少 LDAU/LDAUL/LDAUU/LDAUJ；
  - NSW > 0，可能是结构优化而非静态单点；
  - molecule_ref 不是 Gamma-only；
  - slab/adsorbed_system 的 kz > 1；
  - POTCAR family 和方法设置可能不匹配。

  INFO：
  - 体系含 Ce / 过渡金属 / f-d 元素，是否使用 DFT+U 取决于文献和研究目标；
  - POTCAR 使用 Ce_sv / Ce_pv / 半芯态赝势；
  - ENCUT >= 1.3 × max ENMAX。

  只有没有 ERROR 时，Validate Input Set 才能设置：
  - status=validated
  - usable_for_vasp=true

  WARNING 不阻止通过，但 UI 必须显示。

  4. POTCAR 摘要可以显示，但不要显示 POTCAR 全文。

  允许显示：
  - file size
  - sha256
  - number of potentials
  - element
  - potential label
  - PAW family
  - VRHFIN
  - TITEL 简短行
  - ENMAX / ENMIN
  - ZVAL

  禁止显示：
  - POTCAR 全文；
  - POTCAR 大段 block；
  - 完整赝势参数内容；
  - 将 POTCAR 全文写入 JSON、日志或 UI。

  5. POSCAR 元素顺序解析要兼容 VASP 4 / VASP 5。

  如果 POSCAR 有元素行，正常解析并与 POTCAR 顺序比较。
  如果 POSCAR 没有元素行，不要崩溃，也不要误判 POTCAR 错误。
  应给 warning：
  无法从 POSCAR 读取元素顺序，建议使用 VASP 5 格式 POSCAR。

  6. method_advisor 生成的 method_notes 必须可编辑，且不能在刷新时自动覆盖用户修改。

  建议 UI：
  - 初次选择 method_family / functional 时自动生成 method_notes；
  - 用户可以编辑 method_notes；
  - 提供 “Regenerate method description / 重新生成方法说明” 按钮；
  - 只有点击该按钮时才覆盖当前 method_notes。

  7. 本阶段不做单文件 VASPKIT 重新生成。

  不实现：
  - 用 VASPKIT 101 单独重新生成 INCAR；
  - 用 VASPKIT 102 单独重新生成 KPOINTS；
  - 用 VASPKIT 103 单独重新生成 POTCAR；
  - 用 VASPKIT 105 单独重新生成 POSCAR。

  允许：
  - 手动编辑 INCAR / POSCAR / KPOINTS；
  - POTCAR 摘要显示；
  - Validate Input Set。

  8. 删除旧的 “使用该 Input Set 创建任务” UI 入口。

  Input Set 页面只保留：
  - 查看 metadata；
  - 查看/编辑 INCAR、POSCAR、KPOINTS；
  - POTCAR 摘要；
  - Validate Input Set；
  - Validation summary；
  - 作为 Workflow 输入文件组使用。

  不要再允许从 Input Set 直接创建旧 task。

  9. 测试中请补充：
  - name.strip().lower() 重复检查；
  - 编辑 name 时重复检查；
  - method_notes 和 notes 不互相覆盖；
  - POSCAR 无元素行时给 warning，不崩溃；
  - POTCAR summary 不包含 POTCAR 全文；
  - warning 不阻止 usable_for_vasp=true，error 才阻止；
  - method_advisor 不会自动覆盖用户修改，除非点击 regenerate。

  其他范围保持不变：
  - 不启动 VASP；
  - 不主动启动 VASPKIT；
  - 不改变 VASPKIT 四件套主生成流程；
  - 不做单文件 VASPKIT 重新生成；
  - 不显示 POTCAR 全文；
  - 不删除数据；
  - 不改吸附能公式；
  - 不做 UI 大重构；
  - 不使用 shell=True。

  修改后运行：
  python3 -m compileall src app.py
  .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover -s tests
  grep -R -n --exclude-dir=__pycache__ "shell *= *True\\|shell=True" app.py src tests

  确认以上要求后可以开始实现。

    101 +def parse_potcar_summary(path: Path) -> PotcarSummary:
    102 +    """提取 POTCAR 摘要，不返回或保存 POTCAR 全文。
    103 +
    104 +    只保留 UI 可以展示的关键信息：TITEL/VRHFIN/ENMAX/ENMIN/ZVAL 等。
    105 +    读取时逐行扫描，避免把完整赝势 block 放入内存结构、JSON 或日志。
    106 +    """
    107 +
    108 +    path = Path(path)
    109 +    if not path.exists():
    110 +        return PotcarSummary(False, 0, None, (), ("potcar_missing",))
    111 +
    112 +    potentials: list[dict] = []
    113 +    current: dict | None = None
    114 +    with path.open("r", encoding="utf-8", errors="replace") as fh:
    115 +        for raw_line in fh:
    116 +            line = raw_line.strip()
    117 +            if line.startswith("TITEL"):
    118 +                if current is not None:
    119 +                    potentials.append(current)
    120 +                current = _new_potential_record()
    121 +                current["titel"] = line
    122 +                family, label = _family_and_label_from_titel(line)
    123 +                current["paw_family"] = family
    124 +                current["potential_label"] = label
    125 +                current["element_from_titel"] = _element_from_potential_label(label)
    126 +                continue
    127 +            if current is None and line.startswith(("VRHFIN", "ENMAX", "ZVAL")):
    128 +                current = _new_potential_record()
    129 +            if current is None:
    130 +                continue
    131 +            if line.startswith("VRHFIN"):
    132 +                element = _element_from_vrhfin(line)
    133 +                current["vrhfin"] = element
    134 +                continue
    135 +            if "ENMAX" in line:
    136 +                current["enmax"] = _float_after_key(line, "ENMAX")
    137 +                current["enmin"] = _float_after_key(line, "ENMIN")
    138 +                continue
    139 +            if line.startswith("ZVAL") or " ZVAL" in line:
    140 +                current["zval"] = _float_after_key(line, "ZVAL")
    141 +    if current is not None:
    142 +        potentials.append(current)
    143 +
    144 +    summaries = tuple(_record_to_potential(item) for item in potentials)
    145 +    warnings: list[str] = []
    146 +    if path.stat().st_size > 0 and not any(item.element for item in summaries):
    147 +        warnings.append("potcar_order_unreadable")
    148 +    return PotcarSummary(
    149 +        exists=True,
    150 +        size_bytes=path.stat().st_size,
    151 +        sha256=sha256_file(path),
    152 +        potentials=summaries,
    153 +        warnings=tuple(warnings),
    154 +    )
    155 +
    156 +
    157 +def validate_input_set(
    158 +    input_set: InputSet,
    159 +    *,
    160 +    role: str | None = None,
    161 +    method_family: str | None = None,
    162 +    functional: str | None = None,
    163 +    method_notes: str | None = None,
    164 +) -> ValidationResult:
    165 +    errors: list[ValidationIssue] = []
    166 +    warnings: list[ValidationIssue] = []
    167 +    infos: list[ValidationIssue] = []
    168 +    paths = input_set_file_paths(input_set)
    169 +
    170 +    for filename in CORE_INPUT_FILES:
    171 +        path = paths[filename]
    172 +        if not path.exists():
    173 +            errors.append(_issue("file_missing", "error", f"input_set.validation.{filename.lower()}_missing", filename=filename))
    174 +        elif path.stat().st_size == 0:
    175 +            errors.append(_issue("file_empty", "error", f"input_set.validation.{filename.lower()}_empty", filename=filename))
    176 +
    177 +    poscar_elements = parse_poscar_element_order(paths["POSCAR"]) if paths["POSCAR"].exists() and paths["POSCAR"].stat().st_size > 0 else ()
    178 +    if paths["POSCAR"].exists() and paths["POSCAR"].stat().st_size > 0 and not poscar_elements:
    179 +        warnings.append(_issue("poscar_order_unreadable", "warning", "input_set.validation.poscar_order_unreadable"))
    180 +
    181 +    potcar_summary = parse_potcar_summary(paths["POTCAR"])
    182 +    potcar_elements = potcar_summary.element_order
    183 +    if paths["POTCAR"].exists() and paths["POTCAR"].stat().st_size > 0 and not potcar_elements:
    184 +        warnings.append(_issue("potcar_order_unreadable", "warning", "input_set.validation.potcar_order_unreadable"))
    185 +    if poscar_elements and potcar_elements and tuple(poscar_elements) != tuple(potcar_elements):
    186 +        errors.append(
    187 +            _issue(
    188 +                "poscar_potcar_order_mismatch",
    189 +                "error",
    190 +                "input_set.validation.poscar_potcar_order_mismatch",
    191 +                poscar=", ".join(poscar_elements),
    192 +                potcar=", ".join(potcar_elements),
    193 +            )
    194 +        )
    195 +
    196 +    incar = parse_incar_tags(paths["INCAR"]) if paths["INCAR"].exists() else {}
    197 +    kpoints = parse_kpoints_summary(paths["KPOINTS"]) if paths["KPOINTS"].exists() else {}
    198 +    _validate_encut(incar, potcar_summary, warnings, infos)
    199 +    _validate_functional(functional, method_family, method_notes, incar, potcar_summary, warnings, infos)
    200 +    _validate_kpoints(role, kpoints, warnings)
    201 +    _validate_static_recommendation(incar, warnings)
    202 +
    203 +    return ValidationResult(ok=not errors, errors=tuple(errors), warnings=tuple(warnings), infos=tuple(infos))
    204 +
    205 +
    206 +def parse_poscar_element_order(path: Path) -> tuple[str, ...]:
    207 +    """兼容 VASP 5 和 VASP 4 POSCAR。
    208 +
    209 +    VASP 5 第 6 行是元素符号；VASP 4 第 6 行通常是计数行，无法可靠得到元素顺序。
    210 +    这种情况返回空 tuple，由校验层给 warning，而不是误判 POTCAR 错误。
    211 +    """
    212 +
    213 +    lines = Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace").splitlines()
    214 +    if len(lines) < 7:
    215 +        return ()
    216 +    tokens = lines[5].split()
    217 +    if not tokens or all(_is_number(token) for token in tokens):
    218 +        return ()
    219 +    if all(re.match(r"^[A-Z][a-z]?$", token) for token in tokens):
    220 +        return tuple(tokens)
    221 +    return ()
    222 +
    223 +
    224 +def parse_incar_tags(path: Path) -> dict[str, str]:
    225 +    tags: dict[str, str] = {}
    226 +    if not Path(path).exists():
    227 +        return tags
    228 +    for raw_line in Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace").splitlines():
    229 +        line = raw_line.split("#", 1)[0].split("!", 1)[0].strip()
    230 +        if "=" not in line:
    231 +            continue
    232 +        key, value = line.split("=", 1)
    233 +        tags[key.strip().upper()] = value.strip()
    234 +    return tags
    235 +
    236 +
    237 +def parse_kpoints_summary(path: Path) -> dict:
    238 +    lines = [line.strip() for line in Path(path).read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="replace").splitlines() if line.strip()]
    239 +    scheme = ""
    240 +    grid: tuple[int, int, int] | None = None
    241 +    if len(lines) >= 3:
    242 +        scheme = lines[2].lower()
    243 +    if len(lines) >= 4:
    244 +        values = lines[3].split()
    245 +        if len(values) >= 3 and all(value.lstrip("-").isdigit() for value in values[:3]):
    246 +            grid = tuple(int(value) for value in values[:3])
    247 +    gamma_only = grid == (1, 1, 1) and "gamma" in scheme
    248 +    return {"scheme": scheme, "grid": grid, "gamma_only": gamma_only}
    249 +
    250 +
    251 +def _validate_encut(incar: dict[str, str], potcar: PotcarSummary, warnings: list[ValidationIssue], infos: list[ValidationIssue]) -> None:
    252 +    enmax_values = [item.enmax for item in potcar.potentials if item.enmax is not None]
    253 +    if not enmax_values:
    254 +        return
    255 +    max_enmax = max(enmax_values)
    256 +    encut = _float_value(incar.get("ENCUT"))
    257 +    if encut is None:
    258 +        warnings.append(_issue("encut_missing", "warning", "input_set.validation.encut_missing", max_enmax=max_enmax))
    259 +    elif encut < max_enmax:
    260 +        warnings.append(_issue("encut_below_enmax", "warning", "input_set.validation.encut_below_enmax", encut=encut, max_enmax=max_enmax))
    261 +    elif encut < 1.3 * max_enmax:
    262 +        warnings.append(
    263 +            _issue(
    264 +                "encut_below_recommended",
    265 +                "warning",
    266 +                "input_set.validation.encut_below_recommended",
    267 +                encut=encut,
    268 +                recommended=1.3 * max_enmax,
    269 +            )
    270 +        )
    271 +    else:
    272 +        infos.append(_issue("encut_recommended_ok", "info", "input_set.validation.encut_recommended_ok", encut=encut, recommended=1.3 * max_enmax
         ))
    273 +
    274 +
    275 +def _validate_functional(
    276 +    functional: str | None,
    277 +    method_family: str | None,
    278 +    method_notes: str | None,
    279 +    incar: dict[str, str],
    280 +    potcar: PotcarSummary,
    281 +    warnings: list[ValidationIssue],
    282 +    infos: list[ValidationIssue],
    283 +) -> None:
    284 +    method_text = " ".join(value or "" for value in (functional, method_family, method_notes)).lower()
    285 +    families = {item.paw_family for item in potcar.potentials if item.paw_family}
    286 +    if "lda" in method_text and any(family and "PBE" in family.upper() for family in families):
    287 +        warnings.append(_issue("functional_mismatch", "warning", "input_set.validation.functional_mismatch", functional=functional or "", paw_fam
         ily=", ".join(sorted(families))))
    288 +    if ("pbe" in method_text or "hse" in method_text) and any(family and "LDA" in family.upper() for family in families):
    289 +        warnings.append(_issue("functional_mismatch", "warning", "input_set.validation.functional_mismatch", functional=functional or "", paw_fam
         ily=", ".join(sorted(families))))
    290 +    if "d3" in method_text and "IVDW" not in incar:
    291 +        warnings.append(_issue("d3_missing_ivdw", "warning", "input_set.validation.d3_missing_ivdw"))
    292 +    if ("+u" in method_text or "dft+u" in method_text) and any(tag not in incar for tag in ("LDAU", "LDAUL", "LDAUU", "LDAUJ")):
    293 +        warnings.append(_issue("dftu_missing_tags", "warning", "input_set.validation.dftu_missing_tags"))
    294 +
    295 +    elements = set(potcar.element_order)
    296 +    correlated = sorted(elements & _DF_OR_F_ELEMENTS)
    297 +    if correlated:
    298 +        infos.append(_issue("dftu_literature_reminder", "info", "input_set.validation.dftu_literature_reminder", elements=", ".join(correlated)))
    299 +    semicore = [label for label in potcar.potential_labels if "_" in label]
    300 +    if semicore:
    301 +        infos.append(_issue("semicore_potential", "info", "input_set.validation.semicore_potential", potentials=", ".join(semicore)))
    302 +
    303 +
    304 +def _validate_kpoints(role: str | None, kpoints: dict, warnings: list[ValidationIssue]) -> None:
    305 +    grid = kpoints.get("grid")
    306 +    if not grid:
    307 +        warnings.append(_issue("kpoints_unreadable", "warning", "input_set.validation.kpoints_unreadable"))
    308 +        return
    309 +    if role == "molecule_ref" and not kpoints.get("gamma_only"):
    310 +        warnings.append(_issue("molecule_gamma_recommended", "warning", "input_set.validation.molecule_gamma_recommended", grid=" ".join(str(v) f
         or v in grid)))
    311 +    if role in {"clean_slab", "adsorbed_system"} and len(grid) >= 3 and grid[2] > 1:
    312 +        warnings.append(_issue("slab_kz_recommended", "warning", "input_set.validation.slab_kz_recommended", grid=" ".join(str(v) for v in grid))
         )
    313 +
    314 +
    315 +def _validate_static_recommendation(incar: dict[str, str], warnings: list[ValidationIssue]) -> None:
    316 +    nsw = _int_value(incar.get("NSW"))
    317 +    ibrion = _int_value(incar.get("IBRION"))
    318 +    if nsw is not None and nsw > 0:
    319 +        warnings.append(_issue("static_recommended", "warning", "input_set.validation.static_recommended", nsw=nsw))
    320 +    elif ibrion is not None and ibrion != -1 and nsw is None:
    321 +        warnings.append(_issue("static_recommended", "warning", "input_set.validation.static_recommended", nsw="unknown"))
    322 +
    323 +
    324 +def _new_potential_record() -> dict:
    325 +    return {
    326 +        "element_from_titel": None,
    327 +        "potential_label": None,
    328 +        "paw_family": None,
    329 +        "vrhfin": None,
    330 +        "titel": None,
    331 +        "enmax": None,
    332 +        "enmin": None,
    333 +        "zval": None,
    334 +    }
    335 +
    336 +
    337 +def _record_to_potential(record: dict) -> PotcarPotentialSummary:
    338 +    element = record.get("vrhfin") or record.get("element_from_titel")
    339 +    return PotcarPotentialSummary(
    340 +        element=element,
    341 +        potential_label=record.get("potential_label"),
    342 +        paw_family=record.get("paw_family"),
    343 +        vrhfin=record.get("vrhfin"),
    344 +        titel=record.get("titel"),
    345 +        enmax=record.get("enmax"),
    346 +        enmin=record.get("enmin"),
    347 +        zval=record.get("zval"),
    348 +    )
    349 +
    350 +
    351 +def _family_and_label_from_titel(line: str) -> tuple[str | None, str | None]:
    352 +    if "=" not in line:
    353 +        return None, None
    354 +    tokens = line.split("=", 1)[1].strip().split()
    355 +    family = tokens[0] if tokens else None
    356 +    label = tokens[1] if len(tokens) > 1 else None
    357 +    return family, label
    358 +
    359 +
    360 +def _element_from_vrhfin(line: str) -> str | None:
    361 +    match = re.search(r"VRHFIN\s*=\s*([A-Z][a-z]?)\s*:", line)
    362 +    return match.group(1) if match else None
    363 +
    364 +
    365 +def _element_from_potential_label(label: str | None) -> str | None:
    366 +    if not label:
    367 +        return None
    368 +    match = re.match(r"([A-Z][a-z]?)(?:[_0-9].*)?$", label)
    369 +    return match.group(1) if match else None
    370 +
    371 +
    372 +def _float_after_key(line: str, key: str) -> float | None:
    373 +    match = re.search(rf"{key}\s*=\s*([-+]?\d+(?:\.\d+)?)", line)
    374 +    return float(match.group(1)) if match else None
    375 +
    376 +
    377 +def _float_value(value: str | None) -> float | None:
    378 +    if value is None:
    379 +        return None
    380 +    match = re.search(r"[-+]?\d+(?:\.\d+)?", str(value))
    381 +    return float(match.group(0)) if match else None
    382 +
    383 +
    384 +def _int_value(value: str | None) -> int | None:
    385 +    number = _float_value(value)
    386 +    return None if number is None else int(number)
    387 +
    388 +
    389 +def _is_number(value: str) -> bool:
    390 +    try:
    391 +        float(value)
    392 +    except ValueError:
    393 +        return False
    394 +    return True
    395 +
    396 +
    397 +def _issue(code: str, severity: Severity, message_key: str, **details) -> ValidationIssue:
    398 +    return ValidationIssue(code=code, severity=severity, message_key=message_key, details=details)
    399 +
    400 +
    401 +_DF_OR_F_ELEMENTS = {
    402 +    "Sc", "Ti", "V", "Cr", "Mn", "Fe", "Co", "Ni", "Cu", "Zn",
    403 +    "Y", "Zr", "Nb", "Mo", "Tc", "Ru", "Rh", "Pd", "Ag", "Cd",
    404 +    "Hf", "Ta", "W", "Re", "Os", "Ir", "Pt", "Au", "Hg",
    405 +    "Ce", "Pr", "Nd", "Pm", "Sm", "Eu", "Gd", "Tb", "Dy", "Ho",
    406 +    "Er", "Tm", "Yb", "Lu",
    407 +}

• Added src/vasp_mvp/method_advisor.py (+75 -0)
     1 +from __future__ import annotations
     2 +
     3 +
     4 +def generate_method_description(
     5 +    *,
     6 +    method_family: str | None,
     7 +    functional: str | None,
     8 +    system_type: str = "adsorption",
     9 +    adsorbate_name: str | None = None,
    10 +    elements: tuple[str, ...] = (),
    11 +) -> str:
    12 +    """根据方法选择生成可编辑的计算方法说明。
    13 +
    14 +    该函数只生成默认建议文本，不写数据库；UI 只有在用户显式点击“重新生成”
    15 +    时才会覆盖当前 method_notes，避免刷新页面时覆盖用户手动修改。
    16 +    """
    17 +
    18 +    family = (method_family or "").strip()
    19 +    functional_name = (functional or "").strip()
    20 +    key = functional_name.lower().replace(" ", "")
    21 +    correlated = sorted(set(elements) & _CORRELATED_ELEMENTS)
    22 +    prefix = _system_prefix(system_type, adsorbate_name)
    23 +
    24 +    if key in {"pbe-d3", "pbed3"}:
    25 +        return (
    26 +            f"{prefix} uses DFT total-energy differences with the PBE-D3 functional. "
    27 +            "PBE-D3 is suitable for molecular adsorption, surface adsorption, weak interactions, "
    28 +            "and systems where dispersion contributions are expected to be important."
    29 +        )
    30 +    if key == "hse06" or "hybrid" in family.lower():
    31 +        return (
    32 +            f"{prefix} uses a hybrid DFT description with HSE06. HSE06 can improve electronic "
    33 +            "structure, band-gap, and localized-state descriptions, but it is computationally "
    34 +            "expensive and is usually best used for key-configuration validation."
    35 +        )
    36 +    if key in {"pbe+u", "pbeu"} or "+u" in family.lower():
    37 +        extra = (
    38 +            f" The detected correlated elements are {', '.join(correlated)}."
    39 +            if correlated
    40 +            else ""
    41 +        )
    42 +        return (
    43 +            f"{prefix} uses a DFT+U total-energy workflow. DFT+U is commonly used for transition-metal "
    44 +            "d-electron or rare-earth f-electron systems; U values should be taken from literature "
    45 +            f"or systematic testing and should not be chosen arbitrarily.{extra}"
    46 +        )
    47 +    if key == "pbe" or not functional_name:
    48 +        return (
    49 +            f"{prefix} uses standard DFT total-energy differences with PBE. PBE is useful for general "
    50 +            "structure optimization and baseline DFT total energies, but it may underestimate weak "
    51 +            "van der Waals adsorption interactions."
    52 +        )
    53 +    return (
    54 +        f"{prefix} uses {family or 'the selected method family'} with {functional_name or 'the selected functional'}. "
    55 +        "Document the exchange-correlation functional, dispersion correction, U parameters, and any "
    56 +        "reference-state assumptions before using final adsorption energies."
    57 +    )
    58 +
    59 +
    60 +def _system_prefix(system_type: str, adsorbate_name: str | None) -> str:
    61 +    if system_type == "adsorption":
    62 +        adsorbate = (adsorbate_name or "").strip()
    63 +        if adsorbate:
    64 +            return f"The adsorption workflow for {adsorbate}"
    65 +        return "The adsorption workflow"
    66 +    return "The workflow"
    67 +
    68 +
    69 +_CORRELATED_ELEMENTS = {
    70 +    "Sc", "Ti", "V", "Cr", "Mn", "Fe", "Co", "Ni", "Cu", "Zn",
    71 +    "Y", "Zr", "Nb", "Mo", "Tc", "Ru", "Rh", "Pd", "Ag", "Cd",
    72 +    "Hf", "Ta", "W", "Re", "Os", "Ir", "Pt", "Au", "Hg",
    73 +    "Ce", "Pr", "Nd", "Pm", "Sm", "Eu", "Gd", "Tb", "Dy", "Ho",
    74 +    "Er", "Tm", "Yb", "Lu",
    75 +}

    393 +def _ensure_unique_name(conn: sqlite3.Connection, name: str, *, exclude_input_set_id: str | None = None) -> None:
    394 +    """按 name.strip().lower() 做应用层唯一性检查。
    395 +
    396 +    第一版不加数据库 UNIQUE index，避免历史重复数据直接迁移失败。
    397 +    """
    398 +
    399 +    rows = conn.execute("SELECT input_set_id, name FROM input_sets").fetchall()
    400 +    target = name.strip().lower()
    401 +    for row in rows:
    402 +        if exclude_input_set_id is not None and row["input_set_id"] == exclude_input_set_id:
    403 +            continue
    404 +        if (row["name"] or "").strip().lower() == target:
    405 +            raise ValueError("input_set.name_duplicate")

    239
    240 +def input_set_name_exists(conn, name: str, exclude_input_set_id: str | None = None) -> bool:
    241 +    target = name.strip().lower()
    242 +    rows = conn.execute("SELECT input_set_id, name FROM input_sets").fetchall()
    243 +    return any(
    244 +        (exclude_input_set_id is None or row["input_set_id"] != exclude_input_set_id)
    245 +        and (row["name"] or "").strip().lower() == target
    246 +        for row in rows
    247 +    )
    248 +
    249 +
    250 +def workflow_name_exists(db_file: Path, name: str, exclude_workflow_id: str | None = None) -> bool:
    251 +    target = name.strip().lower()
    252 +    with sqlite3.connect(Path(db_file)) as conn:
    253 +        conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    254 +        rows = conn.execute("SELECT workflow_id, name FROM workflows").fetchall()
    255 +    return any(
    256 +        (exclude_workflow_id is None or row["workflow_id"] != exclude_workflow_id)
    257 +        and (row["name"] or "").strip().lower() == target
    258 +        for row in rows
    259 +    )
    260 +
    261 +
    262  def vaspkit_task_root(config, task_id: str) -> Path:

• Added tests/test_potcar_summary.py (+63 -0)
     1 +from __future__ import annotations
     2 +
     3 +import sys
     4 +import unittest
     5 +from pathlib import Path
     6 +from tempfile import TemporaryDirectory
     7 +
     8 +ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
     9 +SRC = ROOT / "src"
    10 +if str(SRC) not in sys.path:
    11 +    sys.path.insert(0, str(SRC))
    12 +
    13 +from vasp_mvp.input_set_validation import parse_potcar_summary
    14 +
    15 +
    16 +class PotcarSummaryTest(unittest.TestCase):
    17 +    def test_vrhfin_element_order_is_preferred(self) -> None:
    18 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    19 +            path = Path(tmp) / "POTCAR"
    20 +            path.write_text(
    21 +                "TITEL  = PAW_PBE Ce_sv 08Apr2002\n"
    22 +                "VRHFIN =Ce: s2p6d1f1\n"
    23 +                "   ENMAX = 300.000; ENMIN = 250.000\n"
    24 +                "   ZVAL   = 12.000\n"
    25 +                "TITEL  = PAW_PBE O 08Apr2002\n"
    26 +                "VRHFIN =O: s2p4\n"
    27 +                "   ENMAX = 400.000; ENMIN = 300.000\n"
    28 +                "   ZVAL   = 6.000\n"
    29 +                "PRIVATE_PARAMETER_BLOCK_SHOULD_NOT_APPEAR\n",
    30 +                encoding="utf-8",
    31 +            )
    32 +
    33 +            summary = parse_potcar_summary(path)
    34 +            data = summary.to_dict()
    35 +
    36 +            self.assertEqual(summary.element_order, ("Ce", "O"))
    37 +            self.assertEqual(summary.potential_labels, ("Ce_sv", "O"))
    38 +            self.assertEqual(data["number_of_potentials"], 2)
    39 +            self.assertEqual(data["potentials"][0]["enmax"], 300.0)
    40 +            self.assertEqual(data["potentials"][1]["zval"], 6.0)
    41 +            self.assertNotIn("PRIVATE_PARAMETER_BLOCK_SHOULD_NOT_APPEAR", str(data))
    42 +
    43 +    def test_titel_parses_ce_suffix_labels(self) -> None:
    44 +        with TemporaryDirectory() as tmp:
    45 +            path = Path(tmp) / "POTCAR"
    46 +            path.write_text(
    47 +                "TITEL  = PAW_PBE Ce_pv 08Apr2002\n"
    48 +                "   ENMAX = 350.000; ENMIN = 250.000\n"
    49 +                "TITEL  = PAW_PBE Ce_3 08Apr2002\n"
    50 +                "   ENMAX = 320.000; ENMIN = 250.000\n"
    51 +                "TITEL  = PAW_PBE O 08Apr2002\n"
    52 +                "   ENMAX = 400.000; ENMIN = 300.000\n",
    53 +                encoding="utf-8",
    54 +            )
    55 +
    56 +            summary = parse_potcar_summary(path)
    57 +
    58 +            self.assertEqual(summary.element_order, ("Ce", "Ce", "O"))
    59 +            self.assertEqual(summary.potential_labels, ("Ce_pv", "Ce_3", "O"))
    60 +
    61 +
    62 +if __name__ == "__main__":
    63 +    unittest.main()
